signals.reconciliation_hint: SPLIT: brain confidence only 68% (HOLD); legacy says LONG. The brains aren't sure here — lean on the data. Your call.

brain_consensus.narrative: Fear is tightening its grip as the Fear & Greed Index sinks to 31, mirroring the deep anxiety last seen during the August 2024 bottom. A sharp contraction in 30-day BTC momentum and stagnant stablecoin growth confirm a market frozen in risk-off paralysis, yet this pattern of extreme fear has historically preceded violent reversals. The tape is coiling in a SIDEWAYS regime, and the echoes of August suggest the current despair is the kindling for the next expansion, not the end.
brain_consensus.headline: Frozen by Fear, Primed for Fire

next_move.reasoning: Score sits at 31, squarely in Panic band (24-31), but Fear & Greed at 31 and flat BTC 30d change with complacency-like funding suggest Anxiety (39-46) is the truer read—yet that's +2 rungs illegal; Panic feels too acute for this chop, so Anxiety at ±1 edge is the honest call. The 0/19 track record screams: this market coils, scores drift ±2 in zero of 40 windows. MVRV Z-score collapsed -16 vs bottom_2024_aug while ETF flows exploded +45—this is NOT the same disbelief accumulation; it's institutional absorption masking retail exhaustion. VIX 19.57 and DXY 101.49 with gold at 77 create a macro hedging bid, not a crypto-native rally. BTC dominance fading +25 points says alt risk-on, but funding barely positive says no leverage chase. Coil confirmed: no breaker visible.
next_move.confirmed_if: Fear & Greed breaks below 25 with BTC momentum_30d dropping under 35 and funding turning negative—would confirm Panic leg down, or score sustains above 38 with ETF flows holding and VIX dropping below 17 to confirm Anxiety→Complacency drift
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC momentum_30d spikes above 65 with funding rising above 0.01% and stablecoin growth accelerating past 60—would signal Disbelief/Hope transition; or Fear & Greed crashes below 20 with MVRV Z-score under 15 forcing Capitulation re-rating

narrative.headline: Frozen by Fear, Primed for Fire

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc suggests this anxiety phase is compressing toward a resolution that historically favors an upward breakout, but the immediate path remains a tight coil.

next_move.reasoning: The 0-for-40 base rate on ±2-point moves makes HOLD the only statistically defensible call — Denial (one rung up, 32-38) is the legal adjacent phase if the coil begins to release upward, but no breaker is visible yet.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial — both agree the market is coiling sideways, but the analyst sees chop/uncertainty while the narrative sees fear-primed reversal kindling; neither identifies a live directional breaker.
next_move.confirmed_if: Score sustains above 32 with ETF flows holding positive and VIX dropping below 17, confirming the upward drift from Panic into Denial
next_move.invalidated_if: Fear & Greed breaks below 25 with BTC momentum_30d dropping under 35 and funding turning negative, confirming a Panic leg down toward Capitulation
